practice.task: Insert a new employee named 'Diana' with salary 65000 into the employees table, then select all employees.
practice.title: Insert New Employee
practice.code:
-- TODO: Write INSERT and SELECT
-- Table: employees (id, name, salary)

solutionCode:
INSERT INTO employees (name, salary) VALUES ('Diana', 65000);
SELECT name, salary FROM employees;
meta:
TITLE: Insert New Employee
TASK: Insert a new employee and select all.
EXPECTED_OUTPUT: Alice|50000
Bob|60000
Charlie|55000
Diana|65000
HINT: Use INSERT INTO table (cols) VALUES (vals).

variants.label: correct
variants.code:
INSERT INTO employees (name, salary) VALUES ('Diana', 65000);
SELECT name, salary FROM employees;
